1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: get quick-clay release areas with class values (pre-filter columns only)

3.description: reduce quick-clay areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

4.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in Trondheim

7.description: compute municipality centroid from Trondheim geometry (from step 1)

8.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

9.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance_m

10.description: sort buildings by distance ascending and limit to 10

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom
FROM kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredomrid, skredomrnavn, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values

3.description: select kvikkleire polygons with the 'high' risk class (value determined from step 2)

4.description: reduce kvikkleire polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk kvikkleire polygons

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m)

9.description: sort buildings by distance ascending and tie-break by objid if needed
